Remy.fbx — Adobe Mixamo character ("Remy").

Source: https://www.mixamo.com/ (Adobe)
Usage: Mixamo characters/animations are royalty-free for use in projects
(games, apps, research prototypes), including commercial use. You may NOT
redistribute the raw Mixamo asset as a standalone downloadable asset.

This file is used as the "Full (人側)" avatar in the TableDuo study app
(driven by head/wrist/finger tracking via IK; see
.claude/plans/2026-06-16_table-duo_remy-fullbody-avatar.md).

Per Adobe Mixamo terms, bundling within this application is permitted.
